report.title: My PoMS Results And Project Results - Mapping - TEST VERSION
report.description: PomS results for My Records or My Projects page map. Includes full detail location data. Doesn't use cache attributes so we have multi-lingual support. Experimental version to test optmisations.
report.query:
WITH taxon_sum AS ( SELECT cof.sample_id,
SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #beetles_taxon_meaning_id#) AS beetles, SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #bumblebee_taxon_meaning_id#) AS bumblebees, SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #butterflies_moths_taxon_meaning_id#) AS butterflies_moths, SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #honeybee_taxon_meaning_id#) AS honeybee, SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #hoverflies_taxon_meaning_id#) AS hoverflies, SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #other_flies_taxon_meaning_id#) AS other_flies, SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #other_insects_taxon_meaning_id#) AS other_insects, SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #small_insects_taxon_meaning_id#) AS small_insects, SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #solitary_bee_taxon_meaning_id#) AS solitary_bee, SUM((conf.attrs_json->>('#abundance_attr_id#'))::int) FILTER (WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id = #wasp_taxon_meaning_id#) AS wasp
FROM cache_occurrences_functional cof JOIN cache_occurrences_nonfunctional conf ON conf.id = cof.id JOIN samples s ON s.id = cof.sample_id AND s.deleted=false LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_project ON sav_project.sample_id = cof.sample_id AND sav_project.sample_attribute_id = #project_smp_attr_id# AND sav_project.deleted = false #agreements_join# WHERE cof.taxon_meaning_id IN ( #beetles_taxon_meaning_id#, #bumblebee_taxon_meaning_id#, #butterflies_moths_taxon_meaning_id#, #honeybee_taxon_meaning_id#, #hoverflies_taxon_meaning_id#, #other_flies_taxon_meaning_id#, #other_insects_taxon_meaning_id#, #small_insects_taxon_meaning_id#, #solitary_bee_taxon_meaning_id#, #wasp_taxon_meaning_id# ) AND #sharing_filter# AND s.survey_id in ( #public_fit_count_survey_id#,#1km_fit_count_survey_id#,#fit_count_app_survey_id# ) AND ((trim('#year_sort_order#') = '0' OR '#year_sort_order#'='<please select>' OR s.date_end >= CAST((0-(#year_sort_order#)::int)::text || '-01-01' as date)) AND (trim('#year_sort_order#') = '0' OR '#year_sort_order#'='<please select>' OR s.date_start <= CAST((0-(#year_sort_order#)::int)::text || '-12-31' as date))) AND (CAST(s.survey_id AS character varying) = '#filtered_survey_id#' OR '#filtered_survey_id#'='') AND ( (s.created_by_id=#current_user_id# AND #project_id# = 0) OR (#project_id# != 0 AND sav_project.int_value = #project_id#) ) GROUP BY cof.sample_id ),
occurrence_totals AS ( SELECT cof.sample_id, SUM(oav.int_value) AS number_insects FROM cache_occurrences_functional cof JOIN samples s ON s.id = cof.sample_id AND s.deleted=false JOIN occurrence_attribute_values oav ON oav.occurrence_id = cof.id AND oav.occurrence_attribute_id = #abundance_attr_id# AND oav.deleted = false LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_project ON sav_project.sample_id = cof.sample_id AND sav_project.sample_attribute_id = #project_smp_attr_id# AND sav_project.deleted = false #agreements_join# WHERE #sharing_filter# AND s.survey_id in ( #public_fit_count_survey_id#,#1km_fit_count_survey_id#,#fit_count_app_survey_id# ) AND ((trim('#year_sort_order#') = '0' OR '#year_sort_order#'='<please select>' OR s.date_end >= CAST((0-(#year_sort_order#)::int)::text || '-01-01' as date)) AND (trim('#year_sort_order#') = '0' OR '#year_sort_order#'='<please select>' OR s.date_start <= CAST((0-(#year_sort_order#)::int)::text || '-12-31' as date))) AND (CAST(s.survey_id AS character varying) = '#filtered_survey_id#' OR '#filtered_survey_id#'='') AND ( (s.created_by_id=#current_user_id# AND #project_id# = 0) OR (#project_id# != 0 AND sav_project.int_value = #project_id#) ) GROUP BY cof.sample_id )
SELECT #columns#
FROM samples s
JOIN taxon_sum ts ON ts.sample_id = s.id LEFT JOIN occurrence_totals ot ON ot.sample_id = s.id
JOIN cache_samples_functional csf ON csf.id = s.id JOIN cache_samples_nonfunctional csnf ON csnf.id = s.id
LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = s.location_id AND l.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_start_time ON sav_start_time.sample_id = s.id AND sav_start_time.sample_attribute_id = #start_time_attr_id# AND sav_start_time.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_hab ON sav_hab.sample_id = s.id AND sav_hab.sample_attribute_id = #habitat_smp_id# AND sav_hab.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_hab ON ctt_hab.id = sav_hab.int_value
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_hab_lang ON ctt_hab_lang.meaning_id = ctt_hab.meaning_id AND ctt_hab_lang.language_iso = 'eng'
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_other_hab ON sav_other_hab.sample_id = s.id AND sav_other_hab.sample_attribute_id = #other_habitat_smp_id# AND sav_other_hab.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_target ON sav_target.sample_id = s.id AND sav_target.sample_attribute_id = #target_smp_id# AND sav_target.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_target ON ctt_target.id = sav_target.int_value
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_target_lang ON ctt_target_lang.meaning_id = ctt_target.meaning_id AND ctt_target_lang.language_iso = 'eng'
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_other_target ON sav_other_target.sample_id = s.id AND sav_other_target.sample_attribute_id = #other_target_smp_id# AND sav_other_target.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_cover ON sav_cover.sample_id = s.id AND sav_cover.sample_attribute_id = #cover_within_patch_attr_id# AND sav_cover.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_cover ON ctt_cover.id = sav_cover.int_value
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_cover_lang ON ctt_cover_lang.meaning_id = ctt_cover.meaning_id AND ctt_cover_lang.language_iso = 'eng'
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_flowers_counted ON sav_flowers_counted.sample_id = s.id AND sav_flowers_counted.sample_attribute_id = #flowers_counted_attr_id# AND sav_flowers_counted.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_flowers_unit ON sav_flowers_unit.sample_id = s.id AND sav_flowers_unit.sample_attribute_id = #flower_unit_attr_id# AND sav_flowers_unit.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_flowers_unit ON ctt_flowers_unit.id = sav_flowers_unit.int_value
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_flowers_unit_lang ON ctt_flowers_unit_lang.meaning_id = ctt_flowers_unit.meaning_id AND ctt_flowers_unit_lang.language_iso = 'eng'
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_patch_context ON sav_patch_context.sample_id = s.id AND sav_patch_context.sample_attribute_id = #patch_context_attr_id# AND sav_patch_context.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_patch_context ON ctt_patch_context.id = sav_patch_context.int_value
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_patch_context_lang ON ctt_patch_context_lang.meaning_id = ctt_patch_context.meaning_id AND ctt_patch_context_lang.language_iso = 'eng'
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_cloud_cover ON sav_cloud_cover.sample_id = s.id AND sav_cloud_cover.sample_attribute_id = #cloud_cover_attr_id# AND sav_cloud_cover.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_cloud_cover ON ctt_cloud_cover.id = sav_cloud_cover.int_value
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_cloud_cover_lang ON ctt_cloud_cover_lang.meaning_id = ctt_cloud_cover.meaning_id AND ctt_cloud_cover_lang.language_iso = 'eng'
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_wind ON sav_wind.sample_id = s.id AND sav_wind.sample_attribute_id = #wind_attr_id# AND sav_wind.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_wind ON ctt_wind.id = sav_wind.int_value
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_wind_lang ON ctt_wind_lang.meaning_id = ctt_wind.meaning_id AND ctt_wind_lang.language_iso = 'eng'
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_patch_sunshine ON sav_patch_sunshine.sample_id = s.id AND sav_patch_sunshine.sample_attribute_id = #patch_sunshine_attr_id# AND sav_patch_sunshine.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_patch_sunshine ON ctt_patch_sunshine.id = sav_patch_sunshine.int_value
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_patch_sunshine_lang ON ctt_patch_sunshine_lang.meaning_id = ctt_patch_sunshine.meaning_id AND ctt_patch_sunshine_lang.language_iso = 'eng'
LEFT JOIN sample_attribute_values sav_project ON sav_project.sample_id = s.id AND sav_project.sample_attribute_id = #project_smp_attr_id# AND sav_project.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN cache_termlists_terms ctt_project ON ctt_project.id = sav_project.int_value #agreements_join# WHERE #sharing_filter# AND s.survey_id in ( #public_fit_count_survey_id#,#1km_fit_count_survey_id#,#fit_count_app_survey_id# ) AND ((trim('#year_sort_order#') = '0' OR '#year_sort_order#'='<please select>' OR s.date_end >= CAST((0-(#year_sort_order#)::int)::text || '-01-01' as date)) AND (trim('#year_sort_order#') = '0' OR '#year_sort_order#'='<please select>' OR s.date_start <= CAST((0-(#year_sort_order#)::int)::text || '-12-31' as date))) AND (CAST(s.survey_id AS character varying) = '#filtered_survey_id#' OR '#filtered_survey_id#'='') AND ( (s.created_by_id=#current_user_id# AND #project_id# = 0) OR (#project_id# != 0 AND sav_project.int_value = #project_id#) )

param.name: current_user_id
param.description: Current user's warehouse ID. Allows a column to be output indicating that the user owns the record.

param.name: habitat_smp_id
param.description: ID of sample attribute that holds the habitat.

param.name: other_habitat_tt_id
param.description: Termlists_terms ID of the Other habitat option.

param.name: other_habitat_smp_id
param.description: ID of sample attribute that holds the other habitat.

param.name: target_smp_id
param.description: ID of sample attribute that holds the target flower.

param.name: other_target_tt_id
param.description: Termlists_terms ID of the Other Target Flower option.

param.name: other_target_smp_id
param.display: Other target flower sample attribute ID
param.description: ID of sample attribute that holds the other target flower entry.

param.name: insect_abund_occ_id
param.description: ID of occurrence attribute that holds abundances of the insects.

param.name: year_sort_order
param.description: Select a year, or leave blank for all years

param.name: public_fit_count_survey_id
param.description: ID of the public fit count survey.

param.name: 1km_fit_count_survey_id
param.description: ID of the 1km fit count survey.

param.name: fit_count_app_survey_id
param.description: ID of the fit count app survey.

param.name: filtered_survey_id
param.description: Select the survey to return data for

param.name: idlist
param.description: Comma separated list of sample IDs to filter to.

param.name: start_time_attr_id
param.description: ID of the sample attribute that holds the start time.

param.name: cover_within_patch_attr_id
param.display: Cover within patch sample attr ID
param.description: ID of the sample attribute that holds the cover within patch.

param.name: flowers_counted_attr_id
param.description: ID of the sample attribute that holds the flowers counted.

param.name: flower_unit_attr_id
param.description: ID of the sample attribute that holds the flower unit.

param.name: patch_context_attr_id
param.description: ID of the sample attribute that holds the patch context.

param.name: cloud_cover_attr_id
param.description: ID of the sample attribute that holds the cloud cover.

param.name: wind_attr_id
param.description: ID of the sample attribute that holds the wind value.

param.name: patch_sunshine_attr_id
param.description: ID of the sample attribute that holds the patch sunshine.

param.name: bumblebee_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for bumblebee.

param.name: honeybee_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for Honeybee.

param.name: solitary_bee_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for solitary bee.

param.name: wasp_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for wasp.

param.name: hoverflies_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for hoverfly.

param.name: other_flies_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for other flies.

param.name: butterflies_moths_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for butterflies moths.

param.name: beetles_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for beetles.

param.name: small_insects_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for small insects.

param.name: other_insects_taxon_meaning_id
param.description: Meaning ID for other insects.

param.name: abundance_attr_id
param.description: ID of the occurrence attribute that holds abundance.

param.name: england_location_id
param.description: Location ID for England.

param.name: scotland_location_id
param.description: Location ID for Scotland.

param.name: wales_location_id
param.description: Location ID for Wales.

param.name: ni_location_id
param.description: Location ID for Northern Ireland.

param.name: man_location_id
param.description: Location ID for Isle of Mann.

param.name: jersey_location_id
param.description: Location ID for Jersey.

param.name: guernsey_location_id
param.description: Location ID for Guernsey.

param.name: project_smp_attr_id
param.desciption: Attribute that holds a sample's project

column.name: survey_title
column.sql: case s.survey_id when #public_fit_count_survey_id# then 'FIT Count' when #1km_fit_count_survey_id# then 'FIT Count 1km' when #fit_count_app_survey_id# then 'FIT Count App' else '' END

column.name: output_sref
column.sql: get_output_sref( greatest( round(sqrt(st_area(st_transform(s.geom, sref_system_to_srid(s.entered_sref_system)))))::integer, null, 1000, 1000, 10 ), reduce_precision(coalesce(s.geom, l.centroid_geom), false, greatest(null, 1000)) )

column.name: country
column.sql: case when csf.location_ids @> ARRAY[#england_location_id#] THEN 'England' when csf.location_ids @> ARRAY[#scotland_location_id#] THEN 'Scotland' when csf.location_ids @> ARRAY[#wales_location_id#] THEN 'Wales' when csf.location_ids @> ARRAY[#ni_location_id#] THEN 'Northern Ireland' when csf.location_ids @> ARRAY[#man_location_id#] THEN 'Isle of Man' when csf.location_ids @> ARRAY[#jersey_location_id#] THEN 'Jersey' when csf.location_ids @> ARRAY[#guernsey_location_id#] THEN 'Guernsey' ELSE '' END

column.name: habitat
column.sql: CASE WHEN sav_hab.int_value = #habitat_smp_id# THEN 'Other (' || sav_other_hab.text_value || ')' ELSE ctt_hab_lang.term END

column.name: target
column.sql: CASE WHEN sav_target.int_value = #target_smp_id# THEN 'Other (' || sav_other_target.text_value || ')' ELSE ctt_target_lang.term END

column.name: show_public_fit_count_edit_icon
column.display: Show public fit count edit icon

column.name: sc
column.sql: case s.record_status when 'C' then 'blue' when 'V' then 'green' when 'D' then 'orange' when 'R' then '#800000' else 'black' end

column.name: fc
column.sql: case s.record_status when 'V' then 'green' when 'D' then 'orange' when 'R' then '#800000' else 'blue' end
